items.title: Deion Sanders believes Travis Hunter should play both ways, all the time
items.summary: Last month, Colorado coach Deion Sanders expressed disappointment that the Jaguars never contacted him regarding former Buffaloes superstar Travis Hunter.

items.title: Tuchel's complaints lead to Fifa moving photographers
items.summary: England head coach Thomas Tuchel has won a battle with Fifa to get photographers moved away from the bench during the national anthems.
